calendar.matters:
Hearing On Defendant Hassan Kangarloo'S Motion To Set Aside The Judgment Issued July 28, 2008.
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant Hassan Kangarloos' Motion to Set Aside the Judgment issued July 28, 2008 and for New Trial.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Nichole Rodich, #11604.

Matthew Wertheim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Julie Bernard, who was not present at today's hearing.
Robert Shepard, Esq. appeared for defendant Hassan Kangarloo, who was not present at today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court DENIED defendant Hassan Kangarloos' Motion to Set Aside the Judgment issued July 28, 2008 and for New Trial.

Order Denying Defendant Hasan Kangarloos' Motion was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Re Notice Of Defendant Hassan Kangarloo'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For New Trial
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Denied

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: July 28, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Matthew Wertheim, Esq. appeared with plaintiff David Bernard, and for plaintiff Julie Bernard, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Plaintiff David Bernard was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Hassan Kangarloo, an individual.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 27, 2007.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Residential Tenancy Agreement dated 9/19/03------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Settlement & Release Agreement dated 4/19/07-----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Two page letter from Patricia Caldwell to
Matthew Wertheim dated 6/13/07-------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Billing Statement dated 7/28/08------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 1---One page letter from Matthew Wertheim
to Paul Utrect dated 6/4/07----------------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Julie Bernard and David Bernard, and against defendant Hassan Kangarloo, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $49,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $14,130.00.
Costs - $944.25, for a total of $64,074.25.

Furthermore, the cross-complaint filed October 9, 2007 by defendant and cross-complainant Hassan Kangarloo is dismissed.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court
